enum.9: #9 - Battery voltage wire losses too high
enum.11: #11 - Battery ripple voltage on terminals too high
enum.37: #37 - Input voltage absent (mains removed, fuse blown?)
enum.38: #38 - Input shutdown due to battery over-voltage
enum.39: #39 - Input shutdown due to battery over-voltage

enum.43: #43 - Inverter shutdown (voltage over ground relay too high)
enum.53: #53 - Inverter dc level (internal dc rail voltage)
enum.54: #54 - Inverter ac level (output voltage not ok)
enum.65: #65 - Device disappeared during parallel operation (broken cable?)
enum.66: #66 - Incompatible device encountered for parallel operation (e.g. old firmware/different settings)

name: Project Config
⚙ START HERE — Project Config
info:
Edit the 'Project Config' function node to set all project-specific parameters.

The 'Auto Daily Inject' crontab is interpreted in the Cerbo GX local system time.
If the Cerbo timezone = site timezone (recommended), set the crontab to the desired
local time directly:
  e.g. fire at 23:55 local → crontab '55 23 * * *'

If the Cerbo is in UTC, convert manually:
  UTC cron hour = (local_hour + |utcOffsetHours|) % 24
  CR UTC-6 → (23 + 6) % 24 = 5 → '55 5 * * *'

name: Handle HTTP Response
Supabase Response
Prep: energy_daily
func:
const config  = flow.get('config') || {};
const testing = msg.testing === true;
const dumpType = testing ? 'TEST' : (msg._isManual ? 'MANUAL' : 'AUTO');
const p = msg.payload || {};

msg.url     = config.supabaseUrl + '/energy_daily';
msg.headers = {
    'Content-Type':  'application/json',
    'Content-Profile': 'monitoring',
    'apikey':        config.supabaseAnonKey,
    'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + config.supabaseAnonKey,
    'Prefer':        'return=minimal'
};
msg.payload = {
    site_id:               config.siteId,
    date:                  p.date,
    dump_type:             dumpType,
    pv_kwh:                p.pv_kWh,
    grid_kwh:              p.grid_kWh,
    load_kwh:              p.load_kWh,
    battery_charge_kwh:    p.battery_charge_kWh,
    battery_discharge_kwh: p.battery_discharge_kWh,
    min_soc:               p.min_soc === '' ? null : p.min_soc,
    max_soc:               p.max_soc === '' ? null : p.max_soc,
    avg_soc:               p.avg_soc === '' ? null : p.avg_soc,
    outage_count:          p.outage_count,
    outage_minutes:        p.outage_minutes,
    min_voltage:           p.min_voltage     || null,
    max_voltage:           p.max_voltage     || null,
    min_temperature:       p.min_temperature || null,
    max_temperature:       p.max_temperature || null,
    avg_temperature:       p.avg_temperature || null,
    pv_yield_kwh_sc0:      p.pv_yield_kwh_sc0      || null,
    pv_yield_kwh_sc1:      p.pv_yield_kwh_sc1      || null,
    pv_yield_kwh_mppt:     p.pv_yield_kwh_mppt     || null,
    battery_reached_float: p.battery_reached_float || false,
    min_grid_freq:         p.min_grid_freq  || null,
    max_grid_freq:         p.max_grid_freq  || null,
    min_grid_v_l1:         p.min_grid_v_l1  || null,
    max_grid_v_l1:         p.max_grid_v_l1  || null,
    min_grid_v_l2:         p.min_grid_v_l2  || null,
    max_grid_v_l2:         p.max_grid_v_l2  || null,
    grid_data_available:   p.grid_data_available !== undefined ? p.grid_data_available : true,
    pv_kwp_snapshot:       config.pvKwp,
    battery_kwh_snapshot:  config.batteryUsableKWh
};
return msg;
